title: anthoxanthum rariflorum
intro: Anthoxanthum rariflorum, also known as the red fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Anthoxanthum rariflorum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues and skin problems.
